posts.text:
Trey’s Law is named after Texan Trey Carlock. 

Trey was sexually abused, convinced to sign an NDA, and then tragically took his own life.

We break down the need for a national Trey’s Law on Verdict, available wherever you get your podcasts.
posts.quote:
Trey’s Law is named after Texan Trey Carlock. 

Trey was sexually abused, convinced to sign an NDA, and then tragically took his own life.

We break down the need for a national Trey’s Law on Verdict, available wherever you get your podcasts.

posts.text:
On this Verdict with @tedcruz podcast episode, Elizabeth Phillips sat down with Senator Cruz and @benfergusonpodcast to discuss how her brother Trey’s story has inspired legislative efforts that ends the misuse of NDAs from silencing child sexual abuse victims in 12 states, and now federally.

You don’t want to miss this powerful episode about #TreysLaw, which was introduced to the U.S. Congress yesterday as bipartisan legislation led by @sentedcruz of Texas, with seven other Senate co-sponsors
